metadata.name: Create Bill of Materials for an Asset

description: A new asset has been created, and a planner needs to build its Bill of Materials (BOM) of spare parts in the maintenance system.

nodes.task_description: Find the new asset in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct asset record.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the recommended spare parts list from the equipment's OEM manual.

expected_outcome.value: The planner gets the list of required spares from the manual.

nodes.task_description: For each part on the list, add it to the asset's BOM in the maintenance system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully builds the BOM, linking each spare part record to the asset.
